biological_replicate: Mucus was collected from the skin of one P. dolloi individual...
technical_replicate: the two bands with high intensity (arrows) were excised and analyzed separately...
experimental_design: before and during the induction phase of terrestrialization
characterize the skin mucus immunoproteome of African lungfish, Protopterus dolloi, before and during the induction phase of terrestrialization...
factor_value: the immunoproteome of the gill mucus during the terrestrialization induction phase.
number_of_fractions: the two bands with high intensity (arrows) were excised and analyzed separately from the rest of the lane.
number_of_samples: mucus was collected from three different conditions (free-swimming skin mucus, terrestrialized skin mucus, and terrestrialized gill mucus).
